llm_eval.notes: genuine code-review + py_compile OK / frontmatter е®ҢеӮҷ (network:true, write-scope: git-common-dir completion request/transaction/event ledgers only; graph/Markdown writes belong to C02, dependencies:[gh-bridge.py, manage-worktree-lease.py, bd-bridge.py])гҖӮC12 жӨңиЁјжёҲгҒҝ default-branch PR fact гӮ’ C02 consumer зөҢз”ұгҒ§еҶӘзӯү completion + C27 release + beads close гҒёеҸҺжқҹгҖӮremote fact гҒҜ gh-bridge(C12 ACL) зөҢз”ұгҒ®гҒҝгҖҒDEV_GRAPH_GH_FIXTURE гғҶгӮ№гғҲгғ•гғғгӮҜжңүгҖӮc24_context гҒҢ coordination root дёҖиҮҙгӮ’жӨңиЁјгҖӮcompletion decision гҒҜ mergedвҲ§base==defaultвҲ§branch==defaultвҲ§cleanвҲ§synced_defaultвҲ§merge_commit гҒҢ HEAD гҒ® ancestorвҲ§linkage(marker exact-unique + closing reference) гҒ®е…Ё AND (fail-closed гҒ§ conflicts еҲ—жҢҷ)гҖӮcompletion-receipts/<digest>.json гҒ®дәҢзӣёгғҲгғ©гғігӮ¶гӮҜгӮ·гғ§гғіеҸ°еёігҒ« steps(c02_writer/completion_event/system_release/beads_close)гӮ’еҲ»гҒҝ writer_request гӮ’ pinгҖҒstatus=complete гҒӘгӮүеҶӘзӯү replayгҖӮ_writer_applied гҒҢ C02 receipt гҒ® request_digest/graph_revision(+1)/graph_sha256/durable node+Markdown parity гӮ’еҺіж јз…§еҗҲгҒ—еҒҪиЈ…еҸ—й ҳгӮ’жӢ’еҗҰгҖӮfeature_rollup гҒҜ exact-13 + P07/P10/P11 гҒ® PASS evidence receipt(covered_task_ids/phase_ref/feature_acceptance дёҖиҮҙ) гӮ’жӨңиЁјгҖӮsystem-release/beads еӨұж•—гҒҜ pending_retry + exit1 гҒ§е®үе…ЁеҶҚй–ӢгҖӮSMELL: main гҒҢ ~220 иЎҢгҒ§е·ЁеӨ§гғ»еҲҶеІҗиҶЁеӨ§ (зӣЈжҹ»иІ иҚ·) гҒ гҒҢеҗ„ж®өгҒҜ atomic_json гҒ§йҖҗж¬Ў durableгҖҒеҗ„еӨұж•—зөҢи·ҜгҒҢ pending_retry гҒёзё®йҖҖгҒ—дёӯйҖ”з ҙеЈҠгӮ’еӣһйҒҝгҖӮTESTS: test_c25_lifecycle_hook_contract.pyгҖҒtest_runtime_coverage.py::test_reconcile_lifecycle_modesгҖҒtest_semantic_c25_c28 / c26гҖӮ
